ingresos.description: Order revenue aligned to Shopify (net per bucket, after refunds).
ingresos.formula: Order Revenue (app) = Net income per bucket

ordenes.description: Total number of orders in the selected range.

reembolsos.description: Amount refunded in the selected period. Calculated by refund date.
reembolsos.note: May differ from Shopify if you use third-party return apps.

impuestosVentas.description: Taxes paid by customer − taxes refunded.

trueAov.description: Average of non-zero order values (before shipping or taxes).
trueAov.formula: True AOV = Order Revenue / Number of orders > $0

averageOrderValue.description: Average order value (before shipping or taxes).
averageOrderValue.formula: AOV = Order Revenue / Number of orders

newCustomers.description: Percentage of purchases made by new customers.
newCustomers.formula: New Customers % = New customer orders / Total orders

grossSales.description: Gross sales (before shipping, taxes, discounts or refunds).
grossSales.formula: Gross Sales = Product Price × Units Sold

returningCustomers.description: Percentage of orders from returning customers.
returningCustomers.formula: Returning Customers % = Returning customer orders / Total orders

ordersOverZero.description: Total orders with revenue greater than zero.
ordersOverZero.formula: Non-Zero Orders = Count of orders where Order Revenue > $0

newCustomerOrders.description: Total orders from new customers in the selected range.

unitsSold.description: Total units sold (sum of line item quantities).

newCustomerRevenue.description: Total revenue from new customer orders.

returningCustomerRevenue.description: Total revenue from returning customer orders.

discounts.description: Total discounts applied to the order, including shipping discounts.

totalSales.description: Net total sales after shipping, taxes, discounts and refunds. Revenue by order date; refunds by refund date.
totalSales.formula: Total Sales = Gross Sales + Shipping + Taxes − Discounts − Refunded Sales − Refunded Shipping − Refunded Taxes

salesTaxes.description: Total taxes paid by customers, before refunds.

netProfit.description: Net profit after costs and refunds.

sync.fullSyncTitle: Re-fetch last 90 days from Shopify to fix gaps (ensure worker is running)
sync.syncStarted: Sync in progress. Refresh in a moment.
sync.fullSyncStarted: Full sync started. Worker will re-fetch last 90 days.

fullSyncModal.title: Full sync (reconcile with Shopify)
fullSyncModal.whatItDoesBullet1: Clear the sync watermark so the next run ignores previous progress
fullSyncModal.whatItDoesBullet2: Enqueue a job that re-fetches the last 90 days of orders from Shopify
fullSyncModal.whatItDoesBullet3: Upsert every order in that window (fixes missing or outdated data from past failures)
fullSyncModal.whatToExpectBullet1: The sync worker must be running (e.g. npm run dev:worker); otherwise the job will not run
fullSyncModal.whatToExpectBullet2: The job may take several minutes depending on order volume
fullSyncModal.whatToExpectBullet3: Dashboard numbers will update after the run finishes — refresh the page or wait for the next status poll
